source: FilmLA / LAPD / Various LA City Departments

rules.summary: Realistic-looking firearms within 1,000 feet of a K-12 school require LAPD notification via FilmLA and typically an LAPD officer on set. Recommended to film during non-school hours.

details.recommendation: Film when school is not in session

rules.summary: Filming within 500 feet of a hospital requires notification to hospital administration. Ambulance access must remain unobstructed. Noise restrictions are stricter near hospitals. FilmLA coordinates notification with hospital security.

rules.source: Federal Protective Service / GSA / LA City Dept of General Services
rules.summary: Filming near federal buildings requires Federal Protective Service and GSA coordination. LA City Hall and civic buildings have their own permitting. Equipment/crew must stay 50-100 feet from building entrances without permission.
Some Specific Plan areas (Hollywood, parts of the Valley) limit the number of filming days per year at any single residential location. Additional restrictions on frequency and duration may apply.
